sourceList.title: Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - SIBYLLE de Bourgogne ([1150]-after [1204/10]).

Foundation for Medieval Genealogy - SIBYLLE de Bourgogne, daughter of HUGUES "Rufus" de Bourgogne [Capet] Seigneur du Châtelet-Chalon et de Meursault & his first wife Isabelle de Chalon ([1150]-after [1204/10]).

zh.Montreuil, Seine-Saint-Denis, Île-de-Fra: 法國i萊-德-福朗斯瑟-賽吉登尼斯蒙崔易爾
zh.of,Bourgogne,Burgundy,France: 法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易布格
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sybille de Chalons Comtesse de Burgundy於大約1141年出生在法國布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易布格時，她的父親Hugues de Bourgogne III  le Roux21歲，母親Isabelle de Thiers-Châlon17歲。她和Anséric IV de Montréal至少有5個兒子和1個女兒。她去世於1201年之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sybille de Chalons Comtesse de Burgundy于大约1141年出生在法国布格-福朗-可特艾薩o-吉洛易布格时，她的父亲Hugues de Bourgogne III  le Roux21岁，母亲Isabelle de Thiers-Châlon17岁。她和Anséric IV de Montréal至少有5个儿子和1个女儿。她去世于1201年之后。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Sybille
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Sybil
meanings: From the name (Greek Sibylla or Sybilla, with confusion over the vowels from an early period) of a class of ancient prophetesses inspired by Apollo. According to medieval theology, they were pagans denied the knowledge of Christ but blessed by God with some insight into things to come and accordingly admitted to heaven. It was thus regarded as a respectable name to be borne by Christians. This name was introduced to England by the Normans and enjoyed considerable popularity in the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sybille de Chalons Comtesse de Burgundy was born about 1141, in Bourgogne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, her father, Hugues de Bourgogne III  le Roux, was 21 and her mother, Isabelle de Thiers-Châlon, was 17. She had at least 5 sons and 1 daughter with Anséric IV de Montréal. She died after 1201.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sybille de Chalons Comtesse de Burgundy est née environ 1141, à Bourgogne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, France, son père, Hugues de Bourgogne III  le Roux, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Isabelle de Thiers-Châlon, avait 17 ans. Elle a eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille avec Anséric IV de Montréal. Elle est décédée après 1201.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sybille de Chalons Comtesse de Burgundy um 1141 in Bourgogne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Hugues de Bourgogne III  le Roux 21 und ihre Mutter Isabelle de Thiers-Châlon 17. Sie hatte mit Anséric IV de Montréal mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach 1201.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sybille de Chalons Comtesse de Burgundy è nata il circa 1141 nel Bourgogne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, sua padre, Hugues de Bourgogne III  le Roux, aveva 21 anni e sua madre, Isabelle de Thiers-Châlon, aveva 17 anni. Lei avuto almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia con Anséric IV de Montréal. Morì dopo il 1201.

ja.of,Bourgogne,Burgundy,France: フランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーボウルゴグン
ja.lifeSummary: Sybille de Chalons Comtesse de Burgundyが約1141年にフランスボウルゴグネ-フランチェ-コムトeサoネ-エト-ロイアーボウルゴグンで生まれた時，父Hugues de Bourgogne III  le Rouxは21歳，母Isabelle de Thiers-Châlonは17歳であった。彼女はAnséric IV de Montréalとの間に少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1201年以後に死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sybille de Chalons Comtesse de Burgundy(이)가 대략 1141년 프랑스 부르고그니-프랭체-코트e 사o니-트-로이르 부르고그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugues de Bourgogne III  le Roux(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabelle de Thiers-Châlon(은)는 17세였다. 그녀는 Anséric IV de Montréal(와)과 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1201년 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sybille de Chalons Comtesse de Burgundy nasceu aproximadamente 1141, em Bourgogne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, França, seu pai, Hugues de Bourgogne III  le Roux, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Isabelle de Thiers-Châlon, tinha 17 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 5 filhos e 1 filha com Anséric IV de Montréal. Ela faleceu após 1201.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sybille de Chalons Comtesse de Burgundy родилась около 1141 г. в местности бургогн, саoне-ет-лоир, бургогне-фрэнче-комтe, Франция, её отцу по имени Hugues de Bourgogne III  le Roux было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Isabelle de Thiers-Châlon, 17. У неё было по крайней мере 5 сыновей и 1 дочь от Anséric IV de Montréal. Она умерла после 1201 г.

sm.ABT 1141–Aft. 1201: e tusa o le 1141–ina ua ma'ea le 1201

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sybille de Chalons Comtesse de Burgundy nació aproximadamente 1141, en Bourgogne, Saône-et-Loire, Bourgogne-Franche-Comté, Francia, su papá, Hugues de Bourgogne III  le Roux, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Isabelle de Thiers-Châlon, tenía 17 años. Tuvo por lo menos 5 hijos y 1 hija con Anséric IV de Montréal. Murió después de 1201.
